codeReview.summary: The fix directly removes duplicate-value deduplication from startup prewarm URL normalization, so repeated query keys and duplicate selector values remain significant during target matching. The new characterization exercises both mismatch cases and the exact-match positive path, and the current matcher still preserves the earlier path/query-order hardening.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and commit 834fd1f3892de83e41711de19630b1b30d2e2d4d. The implementation now preserves duplicate selector semantics for startup prewarm attribution and adds explicit regression coverage for repeated-key and duplicate-value mismatches, so this fix passes review.
